description: Create a family of three airfoils for a tapered wind turbine blade using a NACA 4415 baseline. Generate the baseline airfoil named 'NACA_4415_Base'. Create a root airfoil named 'NACA_4415_Root' by scaling the baseline to 25% maximum thickness and a tip airfoil named 'NACA_4415_Tip' by scaling the baseline to 12% maximum thickness. Export the three airfoils as coordinate files named 'base.dat', 'root.dat', and 'tip.dat' to /home/ga/Documents/airfoils/family/ and save the project to /home/ga/Documents/projects/airfoil_family_scaling.wpa.
